Deprecated API

Contents

  • Deprecated Interfaces
  • Deprecated Fields
  • Deprecated Methods
  • Deprecated Interfaces 
    Interface and Description
    ecarx.carext.userprofile.IProfile
    ecarx.carext.userprofile.IUserProfile
  • Deprecated Fields 
    Field and Description
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.IAPA.APA_OBSTACLE_TRIGGER_SWITCH
    使用 APA_OBSTACLE_DETECTION_SWITCH，是一样的功能 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ISeat.BACKREST_ANGLE_ADJUST
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#SEAT_BACKREST_ANGLE_2_POS instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ICharging.BATTERY_CHARGING_CURRENT_POWER
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#EV_BATTERY_INSTANTANEOUS_CHARGE_RATE instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ICharging.CHARGING_ESTIMATED_TIME
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#EV_CHARGE_TIME_REMAINING instead on android-13 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IBcm.CHILD_SAFETY_LOCK
    using VehiclePropertyIds#DOOR_CHILD_LOCK_ENABLED instead on Android 14 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IDayMode.FUNC_BRIGHTNESS
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#DISPLAY_BRIGHTNESS instead. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ISafety.GLOVEBOX_LOCK
    use android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#GLOVE_BOX_LOCKED instead. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IBcm.LIGHT_FRONT_FOG_LAMPS
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#FRONT_FOG_LIGHTS_STATE instead on android-13 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IBcm.MIRROR_AUTO_FOLDING
    使用原生ID: MIRROR_AUTO_FOLD_ENABLED --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IBcm.PBC_EPB_SWITCH
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#PARKING_BRAKE_ON instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IBcm.POWER_ONOFF
    使用 #POWER_ON和#POWER_OFF代替 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ISeat.SEAT_HORIZONTAL_ADJUST
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#SEAT_FORE_AFT_POS instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ISeat.SEAT_OCCUPANCY_STATUS
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#SEAT_OCCUPANCY instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ISeat.SEAT_OCCUPANCY_STATUS
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#SEAT_OCCUPANCY instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ISeat.SEAT_VERTICAL_ADJUST
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#SEAT_HEIGHT_POS instead. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.IBcm.TRAILER_PRESENT
    在APILevel-33时，使用同名原生接口android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#TRAILER_PRESENT --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.v446k.ICarInfo.UNIT_TIME_FORMAT
    Settings.System.TIME_12_24 --- by hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.module.ICarInfo.VEHICLE_MOTION_STATUS
    using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#PERF_VEHICLE_SPEED instead.When the vehicle is moving forward, PERF_VEHICLE_SPEED is positive and negative when the vehicle is moving backward. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
  • Deprecated Methods 
    Method and Description
    ecarx.carext.vehicle.ICarValue.getSupportValues()
    using ICarConfig.getSupportValues() instead
